name: Kuva Ogris
description: The custom weapon of a fearsome Kuva Lich. Unlike the basic version the Kuva Ogris fires detonite-infused casings semi-automatically, from a smaller magazine, while dealing greater damage per shot.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The custom weapon of a fearsome Kuva Lich. Unlike the basic version the Kuva Ogris fires detonite-infused casings semi-automatically, from a smaller magazine, while dealing greater damage per shot.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
Kuva Ogris
Kuva Ogris: From 30 to 7

patchlogs.name: Update 31.1.0: Echoes of War
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted the Ogris and Kuva Ogris Nightwatch Napalm FX to be cleaner and use energy color consistently.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.7
patchlogs.changes:
Increased the base damage (before elemental bonus) of the Kuva Ogris from 454 to 714.
Fixed Kuva Lich weapons that do damage on both impact and explosion (Kuva Ogris, Kuva Ayanga, etc) doing significantly less overall damage than expected. This was due to the Elemental bonus only being applied to the "on impact" of the projectile itself and not the explosion.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.6 + 26.0.6.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed the Kuva Ogris not creating a fireball or any fire FX on impact if the Nightwatch Napalm Mod is equipped.
